title: Glossy Crisp Venezuelan Cherry Skillet
description: A bitter and crisp Venezuelan dish featuring cherries with an al-dente finish, made in an iron teppan skillet.
instructions: Preheat the iron teppan skillet over medium heat.
In a bowl, whisk together almond flour, coconut sugar, and salt.
Add unsalted butter to the skillet and let it melt.
Add the whisked dry ingredients to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes.
In a separate bowl, whisk together large eggs and vanilla extract.
Add the egg mixture to the skillet and stir until combined.
Add pitted cherries and water to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes or until the cherries are tender.
Remove the skillet from heat and let it cool for a few minutes.
